description_zh: 传了非猫的照片(狗或物体),与 04 区别在'有动物但不是猫'
description_en: Non-cat photo uploaded (dog or object) — differs from 04 in that there IS an animal, just not a cat

expectations.rationale: agreed sentinel for any non-cat photo
no health score when no cat present
summary should explain no cat seen + suggest retake
no warnings — there's no cat to warn about

qualitative_criteria_zh: 即使照片里有狗或其他动物,也必须坚持'没看到猫'路径,不能开始评论狗
不应该把狗的特征'翻译'到猫身上
应该友好建议主人传一张猫的照片
qualitative_criteria_en: Even if a dog or other animal is visible, must stay on the 'no cat detected' path — must NOT start grading the dog
Must NOT 'translate' dog features into cat findings
Should friendly-suggest uploading a cat photo instead
